messages.content: spark报 26/02/17 15:34:04 WARN MetricsConfig: Cannot locate configuration: tried hadoop-metrics2-s3a-file-system.properties,hadoop-metrics2.properties 26/02/17 15:34:20 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources 26/02/17 15:34:35 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources 26/02/17 15:34:50 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources 26/02/17 15:35:05 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources 26/02/17 15:35:20 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources 26/02/17 15:35:35 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources 26/02/17 15:35:50 WARN TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources; check your cluster UI to ensure that workers are registered and have sufficient resources

你这两类 WARN 含义不一样，需要分别处理：

## 1) `MetricsConfig: Cannot locate configuration...`
这是 **Hadoop metrics2 配置文件没找到** 的提示，一般**不影响作业运行**（只是不会上报某些 metrics）。

- 你用了 `s3a://` 或相关文件系统时，它会尝试找：
  - `hadoop-metrics2-s3a-file-system.properties`
  - `hadoop-metrics2.properties`
- 解决方式（任选其一）：
  1. **忽略**（最常见）
  2. 在 `$HADOOP_CONF_DIR` 或 classpath 放一个 `hadoop-metrics2.properties`（哪怕是默认模板）
  3. 确认 `HADOOP_CONF_DIR`/`YARN_CONF_DIR` 是否指向正确配置目录（如果你本来就需要这些 metrics）

## 2) `TaskSchedulerImpl: Initial job has not accepted any resources...`
这个是关键：**Spark 一直拿不到可用资源**，所以任务始终不启动。常见原因如下（按概率从高到低）：

### A. Standalone 模式：worker 没注册 / master 地址不对
检查你是 `--master spark://...` 吗？
- 打开 Master UI：`http://<master>:8080`
  - Workers 是否为 0？
  - Worker 是否 Alive？
- Worker 日志里是否成功注册到 master
- 提交时 master URL 是否写错（host/port）

### B. Yarn 模式：队列/权限/资源不足，AM 没拿到 container
如果是 `--master yarn`：
- 看 ResourceManager UI：`http://<rm>:8088`
- `yarn application -list` 看应用是否一直处于 ACCEPTED
- 常见卡住原因：
  - 队列容量满了/被限制
  - 你申请的 `--executor-memory/--executor-cores/--num-executors` 太大
  - 没有提交到正确队列：`--conf spark.yarn.queue=xxx`
  - Kerberos/权限导致无法分配资源（日志会有更明显错误）

### C. Kubernetes 模式：pod 起不来/被调度失败
如果是 `--master k8s://...`：
- `kubectl get pods -n <ns>`
- 看 pod events（资源不足、镜像拉取失败、权限、node selector 等）

### D. 你在 Local 模式却仍然等资源（不常见）
如果想本机跑，确保 `--master local[*]` 或 `local[n]`。

---

## 你先给我 4 个信息，我可以直接定位到是哪一种
1. 你提交用的命令（至少包含 `--master` 和资源参数）
2. `spark-submit` 的 deploy mode（client/cluster）
3. 集群模式：Standalone / YARN / K8s？
4. Spark UI/集群 UI 里 Workers/Executors 是否为 0（截图也行）

另外，先做一个快速验证：
- Standalone：打开 `http://<master>:8080` 看有没有 worker
- YARN：打开 `http://<rm>:8088` 看应用是否一直 ACCEPTED
